empty.add-asset-message: Add another asset before you can swap.

quote.failed: Could not get a price. Try again.
quote.price-changed: Price changed. Review the new amount before swapping.
quote.unavailable: These assets cannot be swapped right now. Try a smaller amount or choose another asset.
